skill_idea.description: Use when a maintainer needs a complex generated review helper with cross-file evidence notes, fixture guidance, and bounded maintenance instructions.
skill_idea.purpose: Maintain a complex generated review helper that coordinates evidence intake, generated fixture review, maintenance record checks, and public-safe reporting.
skill_idea.evidence_policy: current direct evidence required before target acceptance
use_when: A maintainer needs to review generated evidence across SKILL.md, references, fixtures, tests, templates, and SkillGuard records.
A generated helper must preserve public-safe blockers and current maintenance record validation.
do_not_use_when: The request asks for package publication, release readiness, external service integration, or sealed task material.
The target does not have current generated files or direct validation evidence.
required_workflow: Inspect generated entrypoint, README, references, assets, fixtures, tests, and .skillguard records before making claims.
Run check-skill and check-maintenance-record against current generated evidence.
Run detect-stale-evidence read-only when generated evidence is reused; if stale, rerun only the exact declared owner.
Report skipped checks, residual risk, and claim boundaries before closure.
hard_gates: Do not overwrite user-authored files in or near the generated target.
Do not accept missing generated files, invalid fixture manifests, stale evidence, or private-looking output.
Keep generated records draft until separate reviewer judgment exists.

SKILL.md: Maintain a complex generated review helper that coordinates evidence intake
Inspect the current target files before making claims.
Run deterministic checks that are available for the declared scope.
Do not treat generated scaffold files as acceptance evidence.
assets/templates/check_report.template.j: replace this template with current evidence before closure
